mapper.sql: action_id, order_id, dispute_id, action_type, request_id, wallet_biz_id, actor_user_id, counterparty_user_id, amount, status, result_type, wallet_txn_id, failure_code, last_error, retry_count, next_retry_at, processing_lease_until, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into market_wallet_action( action_id, order_id, dispute_id, action_type, request_id, wallet_biz_id, actor_user_id, counterparty_user_id, amount, status, result_type, wallet_txn_id, failure_code, last_error, retry_count, next_retry_at, processing_lease_until ) values( #{actionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{orderId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{disputeId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{actionType}, #{requestId}, #{walletBizId}, #{actorUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{counterpartyUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{resultType}, #{walletTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{failureCode}, #{lastError}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{processingLeaseUntil} )
mapper.select: select from market_wallet_action where status in ('PENDING', 'RETRYING') and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= #{asOf}) order by coalesce(next_retry_at, create_time) asc, action_id asc limit #{limit}
select from market_wallet_action where wallet_txn_id is not null and status != 'SUCCEEDED' order by update_time asc, action_id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update market_wallet_action set status = 'PROCESSING', processing_lease_until = #{leaseUntil}, update_time = current_timestamp where action_id = #{actionId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status in ('PENDING', 'RETRYING')

update market_wallet_action set status = 'SUCCEEDED', result_type = #{resultType}, wallet_txn_id = #{walletTxnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, failure_code = null, last_error = null, processing_lease_until = null, update_time = current_timestamp where action_id = #{actionId, jdbcType=BINARY}
update market_wallet_action set status = 'CANCELLED', result_type = #{resultType}, processing_lease_until = null, update_time = current_timestamp where action_id = #{actionId, jdbcType=BINARY}

update market_wallet_action set status = 'CANCELLED', result_type = #{resultType}, processing_lease_until = null, update_time = current_timestamp where request_id = #{requestId} and action_type = 'ESCROW' and status in ('PENDING', 'RETRYING')

update market_wallet_action set status = 'RETRYING', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, processing_lease_until = null, update_time = current_timestamp where action_id = #{actionId, jdbcType=BINARY}

update market_wallet_action set status = 'FAILED', failure_code = #{failureCode}, last_error = #{lastError}, processing_lease_until = null, update_time = current_timestamp where action_id = #{actionId, jdbcType=BINARY}
update market_wallet_action set status = 'DEAD', last_error = #{lastError}, processing_lease_until = null, update_time = current_timestamp where action_id = #{actionId, jdbcType=BINARY}

update market_wallet_action set status = 'RETRYING', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = current_timestamp, processing_lease_until = null, update_time = current_timestamp where status = 'PROCESSING' and processing_lease_until is not null and processing_lease_until <= #{asOf}
